subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I humbly supplicate unto the Kingdom of Thy mercy, and abase myself before the dominion of Thy sovereignty, and call upon Thee with my heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی ابتهل الی ملکوت رحمتک و اتذلل الی جبروت سلطنتک و ادعوک بقلب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for praise and gratitude
